commands.name: model
commands.description: Show current model selection

commands.name: fast
commands.description: Toggle fast mode

commands.name: advisor
commands.description: Toggle advisor

subcommands.name: dump
subcommands.description: Copy the advisor's transcript to clipboard

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export session to HTML file

commands.name: dump
commands.description: Return full transcript as plain text, with LLM request JSON path

commands.name: share
commands.description: Share session via an encrypted link (share server or secret gist)

commands.name: browser
commands.description: Toggle browser headless vs visible mode

commands.name: todo
commands.description: Manage todos

subcommands.name: copy
subcommands.description: Copy todos as Markdown to clipboard

subcommands.name: export
subcommands.description: Write todos as Markdown to a file (default: TODO.md)

subcommands.name: import
subcommands.description: Replace todos from a Markdown file (default: TODO.md)

subcommands.name: append
subcommands.description: Append a task; phase fuzzy-matched or auto-created

commands.name: session
commands.description: Show session information

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Delete current session and return to selector

commands.name: jobs
commands.description: Show background jobs

commands.name: usage
commands.description: Show token usage

subcommands.name: reset
subcommands.description: Spend a saved Codex rate-limit reset

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Launch the local stats dashboard

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Show changelog

commands.name: tools
commands.description: Show available tools

commands.name: context
commands.description: Show context usage

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Manage MCP servers

subcommands.name: unauth
subcommands.description: Remove OAuth auth from a server

subcommands.name: smithery-search
subcommands.description: Search Smithery registry and deploy an MCP server

subcommands.name: smithery-login
subcommands.description: Login to Smithery and cache API key

subcommands.name: reconnect
subcommands.description: Reconnect to a specific MCP server

subcommands.name: resources
subcommands.description: List available resources from connected servers

subcommands.name: prompts
subcommands.description: List available prompts from connected servers

commands.name: ssh
commands.description: Manage SSH connections

commands.name: fresh
commands.description: Reset provider stream state without changing the local transcript

commands.name: compact
commands.description: Compact the conversation

subcommands.name: soft
subcommands.description: Summarize locally with the active model (skip remote endpoints)

subcommands.name: remote
subcommands.description: Summarize via the remote endpoint / provider-native compaction

subcommands.name: snapcompact
subcommands.description: Archive history onto dense bitmap images the model reads back (no LLM call)

commands.name: shake
commands.description: Shake heavy content out of the conversation context

commands.name: memory
commands.description: Manage memory

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.description: Clear persisted memory data and artifacts

subcommands.name: mm list
subcommands.description: List mental models on the active bank

subcommands.name: mm refresh
subcommands.description: Refresh auto-refresh models bank-wide, or one model by id

subcommands.name: mm history
subcommands.description: Diff the change history of a mental model

subcommands.name: mm seed
subcommands.description: Create any built-in mental models that are missing

subcommands.name: mm delete
subcommands.description: Delete a mental model from the bank (id required)

commands.name: rename
commands.description: Rename the current session

commands.name: move
commands.description: Move the current session to a different directory

commands.name: marketplace
commands.description: Manage plugins from marketplaces

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install a plugin (interactive browser if no args)

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Uninstall a plugin (selector if no args)

commands.name: plugins
commands.description: Manage plugins

commands.name: reload-plugins
commands.description: Reload all plugins

commands.name: force
commands.description: Force next turn to use a specific tool

commands.name: autoresearch
commands.description: Toggle builtin autoresearch mode, or pass off / clear, or a goal message.

commands.name: green
commands.description: Generate a prompt to iterate on CI failures until the branch is green

commands.name: review
commands.description: Launch interactive code review

commands.name: grok:cancel
commands.description: Cancel a running background Grok job

commands.name: grok:rescue
commands.description: Delegate a coding or investigation task to Grok (write-capable by default)

commands.name: grok:result
commands.description: Show the final output of a completed Grok job

commands.name: grok:review
commands.description: Run a read-only Grok code review of your uncommitted changes or a branch

commands.name: grok:search
commands.description: Search X (Twitter) and the web in real time with Grok, then summarize with sources

commands.name: grok:setup
commands.description: Check whether the local Grok CLI is installed and authenticated

commands.name: grok:status
commands.description: Show running and recent Grok jobs for this repository

commands.name: codex:adversarial-review
commands.description: Run a Codex review that challenges the implementation approach and design choices

commands.name: codex:alerts
commands.description: Check Codex jobs for drift - stalls, repeated command failures, errors, long runtimes, orphaned workers, goal drift - as compact alerts

commands.name: codex:artifacts
commands.description: List the evidence files (screenshots, logs, reports) a Codex job saved to its artifact directory

commands.name: codex:cancel
commands.description: Cancel an active background Codex job in this repository

commands.name: codex:continue
commands.description: Start a follow-up Codex turn on a specific existing thread with a corrective or continuation prompt

commands.name: codex:goal
commands.description: Set, show, or clear a persistent goal on a Codex job or thread to keep long-running loops anchored

commands.name: codex:items
commands.description: List compact thread items (messages, commands, file changes) with type filters and a hard output budget

commands.name: codex:rescue
commands.description: Delegate investigation, an explicit fix request, or follow-up rescue work to the Codex rescue subagent

commands.name: codex:result
commands.description: Show the stored final output for a finished Codex job in this repository

commands.name: codex:review
commands.description: Run a Codex code review against local git state

commands.name: codex:setup
commands.description: Check whether the local Codex CLI is ready, toggle the stop-time review gate, set sandbox trust, and print statusline setup

commands.name: codex:status
commands.description: Show active and recent Codex jobs for this repository, including review-gate status and latest activity

commands.name: codex:steer
commands.description: Steer the active turn of a running background Codex job with a short corrective instruction

commands.name: codex:tail
commands.description: Show the last N progress log lines for a Codex job (bounded, local, no server call)

commands.name: codex:thread
commands.description: Show a compact header for one Codex thread (no transcript dump)

commands.name: codex:threads
commands.description: List recent Codex threads for this workspace, one compact line per thread

commands.name: codex:transfer
commands.description: Transfer the current Claude Code session into a resumable Codex thread

commands.name: codex:turns
commands.description: List a Codex thread's turns newest-first with one-line summaries and pagination

commands.name: init
commands.description: Generate AGENTS.md for current codebase
